claim_boundary: D025-C is a closure and recommendation report only; it authorizes no Gate 6 run, calibration/final-test access, mission-loop execution, model fitting, QML invention claim, quantum-advantage claim, or Gate 5 reinterpretation.
gate6_recommendation: Do not proceed to a QML Gate 6 mission experiment from P001.
if_human_opens_gate6: Open a separate baseline/safety mission protocol only, with C06 or numerical-reference controls and no QML advantage claim.
manuscript_action: Report Gate 5 as a valid technical FAIL, report post-Gate-5 QML tests as exploratory negatives, and discuss recall-first CSAFE-RF only as future protocol design.
